name: Vapman Borosilicate Glass Mouthpiece
summary: The Vapman Borosilicate Glass Mouthpiece is a premium upgrade crafted to deliver pure, flavorful vapour with every session.
description: The Vapman Borosilicate Glass Mouthpiece is a premium upgrade crafted to deliver pure, flavorful vapour with every session. Made from high-quality borosilicate glass, it enhances your Vapman experience while adding durability and elegance to your portable setup. Borosilicate glass is heat-resistant and non-reactive, preserving the natural taste of your herbs. Unlike plastic or metal, this mouthpiece ensures every draw is smooth, clean, and true to the source, offering a superior vaping experience. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
